## TDD Proof

- [ ] Failing test(s) were written first.
- [ ] I captured why the test failed initially.
- [ ] I added the minimal implementation needed to make the test pass.
- [ ] I ran the targeted test command below.
- [ ] I ran the owning-folder or full suite command below.

- Failing test proof:
- Why it failed:
- Minimal implementation:
